prestazioni: 3ZZ-FE (1.8L 4-cylinder) engine swap to a naturally aspirated 2ZZ-GE (1.8L 4-cylinder) with a TODA Racing Stage 2+ camshaft kit (272° duration, 11.5mm lift) and Toda Racing ITB (Individual Throttle Body) kit with 45mm Jenvey throttle bodies, paired with a custom 4-2-1 stainless steel header by HKS and a Tomei 70mm titanium exhaust system with a straight-pipe design for optimal scavenging

OS Giken 6-speed LSD (Limited Slip Differential) with a 4.300 final drive ratio, reinforced with Cusco 2-way differential mounts and a custom driveshaft by Driveshaft Shop to handle increased torque from the 2ZZ-GE build

Öhlins DFV (Dual Flow Valve) Road & Track coilovers with custom valving for the MR-S chassis, paired with Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear), Whiteline adjustable rear toe arms, and SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, rear trailing arms, and subframe mounts) for razor-sharp handling
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders (hand-laid by Seibon Carbon) to fit 17x9.5 +22 front and 17x10.5 +30 rear Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels, wrapped in 225/45/17 and 255/40/17 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires

Custom front bumper lip by Rocket Bunny (MR-S-specific design) with integrated carbon fiber canards by APR Performance, paired with a custom rear diffuser by Varis Japan and a carbon fiber duckbill spoiler by Top Secret, all finished in a 3-stage matte white pearl with custom gold leaf accents

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (MR-S-specific mounts), Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses, a custom roll cage by Cusco (bolt-in 8-point design with integrated harness bars), and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, paired with a custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay by AutoTecknic and a full Alcantara headliner by Katzkin
